---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

**Example**: "I'm always frustrated when [...]" or "It would be helpful to [...]"

## Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution. How should this feature work?

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Describe them here.

## Use Case

Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be useful.

**Example**:
"As a DevOps engineer deploying EDOT to Kubernetes, I want to [...] so that [...]"

## Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, sketches, or examples from other tools that demonstrate what you're envisioning.

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented technically, share them here. (Optional)

## Benefits

Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] New users learning EDOT
- [ ] Developers building topologies
- [ ] Platform engineers deploying at scale
- [ ] Documentation writers
- [ ] Other: _______

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would improve my workflow
- [ ] Critical for my use case
- [ ] Blocking my adoption of the tool

## Related Features

Are there existing features this relates to or builds upon?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, links to documentation, or screenshots about the feature request here.

---

**Checklist before submitting:**
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this hasn't been requested
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this solves
- [ ] I have described the proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered alternative approaches
